name: facility-maintenance
description: Facility maintenance company website + client/admin portal (client/ + server/).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: ( [ -f ../secrets/server.env ] && [ ! -f server/.env ] && cp ../secrets/server.env server/.env || true ) && npm run install:all && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
